---
title: "Appendix A: The Master Excel-to-R Cheat Sheet"
appendix: true
---

## Core Translation Map

| Excel term | R equivalent | Plain-language use |
|------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|
| Worksheet table | data frame | Structured tabular data |
| Filter | `filter()` | Keep only rows you need |
| Sort | `arrange()` | Reorder rows |
| VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP | `left_join()` | Pull matching columns from another table |
| Pivot table | `group_by()` + `summarise()` | Build grouped summaries |
| IF | `if_else()` or `case_when()` | Apply conditional logic |
| Text cleanup | `stringr` | Clean messy text |
| Save file | `write_csv()` | Export clean output |

## Common Patterns

Placeholder for expanded cheat sheet tables and workflow snippets.
